claim: Tier 7.4a predeclared a general cost-aware policy/action selection mechanism gate after the NAB closeout. It defines asymmetric action costs, abstain/act/wait decisions, delayed consequences, external baselines, shams, ablations, metrics, pass/fail criteria, and compact-regression requirements before implementation.
caveat: Contract-only evidence; not a scoring run, not a promoted mechanism, not public usefulness proof, not a baseline freeze, not hardware/native transfer, and not AGI/ASI evidence.
